# LoansForSurgeons

> LoansForSurgeons (loansforsurgeons.com) — Matches surgeons with licensed specialists: honest routing to physician loan programs for employed W-2s, and specialist lending for private practice, locum 1099s, K-1 partners, jumbo cash-out, and the Physician HELOC. LoansForSurgeons is an AdaptLend service (adaptlend.com) and is not a lender.

## Key facts

- Employed W-2 surgeons are honestly routed to bank physician loan programs when those win (low down, no PMI, gentle student-debt treatment).
- Private-practice surgeons qualify on practice deposits or CPA P&L; locum surgeons on gross 1099 facility contracts (~90%).
- Surgical-group K-1s under two years work with the partnership agreement and draw history.
- The Physician HELOC commonly funds group/ASC buy-ins and build-outs at jumbo-sized limits.
- Filling out the form does not affect credit; a credit check only happens if the borrower moves forward with a specialist.

## How it works

1. Answer a few plain-English questions (about two minutes, no credit check).
2. LoansForSurgeons matches the borrower with a licensed specialist for this exact situation.
3. The specialist contacts the borrower within one business day; the match also arrives by email.

## Related resources

- [Jumbo loan requirements guide](https://lumolend.com/guides/jumbo-loan-requirements/) — LumoLend, an Honest Casa company
- [Free DTI calculator](https://lumolend.com/tools/dti-calculator/) — LumoLend
- [LumoLend](https://lumolend.com/) — price purchase, refinance, and HELOC scenarios with live indicative rates; free calculators and 40+ mortgage guides
